A

add(Object, T) - Method in class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.task_1_2_2.Tree
Adds new child node to the node of the tree specified by its value and returns node's identifier.

add2(T) - Method in class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.task_1_2_2.Tree
Adds new node with the specified value to the tree and returns node's identifier.
addAll(Collection<? extends T>) - Method in class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.task_1_2_2.Tree
 
addAll(T, Collection<? extends T>) - Method in class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.task_1_2_2.Tree
Adds all the elements in the specified collection to a node of the tree specified by its identifier.
addAllById(int, Collection<? extends T>) - Method in class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.task_1_2_2.Tree
Adds all the elements in the specified collection to a node of the tree specified by its identifier.
addById(int, T) - Method in class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.task_1_2_2.Tree
Adds new child node to the node of the tree specified by id and returns node's identifier.
